name: TC-OT-002 — GET /api/v1/token: access_token is a valid RS256 JWT
description:
**What this test does:**
Decodes the access_token returned by GET /api/v1/token and verifies it is a properly structured JSON Web Token: exactly 3 base64url parts (header.payload.signature) and the header declares alg=RS256.

**Why it matters:** A malformed or non-RS256 token will be rejected by the KCB API, silently breaking all data ingestion without a clear error.
descriptionHtml:
What this test does:
Decodes the access_token returned by GET /api/v1/token and verifies it is a properly structured JSON Web Token: exactly 3 base64url parts (header.payload.signature) and the header declares alg=RS256.

Why it matters: A malformed or non-RS256 token will be rejected by the KCB API, silently breaking all data ingestion without a clear error.
